title: Trending Graphic T-Shirt Design — PNG for Print-On-Demand — Commercial Use
description:
3 PNG graphics with transparent background, 4500×5400 at 300 DPI. Compatible with Printful, Printify, RedBubble, etc. Commercial use included.

What buyers are responding to in 2026: The sources consist of Reddit discussions regarding t-shirt mockups, the technical challenges of simplifying complex ideas into two-color designs for printing, and a general list of various design disciplines.
style_prompt: bold graphic t-shirt design, single subject, transparent background, vector-style, no text
